positive: Minimalist geometric wave pattern featuring interconnected arcs and flowing lines, abstract representation of ocean energy and tranquility. The design uses a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, bright cyan, and stark white, printed against a neutral background. Emphasis on strong silhouettes, clean negative space, and repetitive yet varied composition suitable for apparel. Flat graphic design style, vector illustration, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, cinematic lighting, art deco influence, maximalist pattern, high contrast, crisp lines, tattoo flash style.
